description: Exact JSON contract Claude must return when deterministic confidence is below threshold

example_response.diagnosis: The measure uses FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Year] = YEAR(TODAY())) which is a common but suboptimal pattern. The YEAR(TODAY()) call evaluates at query time which is correct, but wrapping it in FILTER(ALL('Date')) prevents the storage engine from using a direct column equality filter, causing a full date table scan on every query. Additionally, TODAY() can cause refresh-time staleness if the dataset is not refreshed at year boundary.
example_response.answer: Replace FILTER(ALL('Date'), 'Date'[Year] = YEAR(TODAY())) with a direct column filter 'Date'[Year] = YEAR(TODAY()) inside CALCULATE. This allows VertiPaq to use its bitmap index for the Year column directly, reducing the filter materialization cost. For fiscal year alignment, consider DATESYTD('Date'[Date]) instead.

suggested_rule.pattern: FILTER(ALL(DimTable), single_column_equality_condition) used where a direct column filter suffices

conditions: ALL wraps a single dimension table
inner condition tests equality or range on exactly one column
direct column filter argument would produce identical result

suggested_rule.fixed_dax: Replace FILTER(ALL(Table), Table[Col] = value) with direct column filter: CALCULATE([measure], Table[Col] = value)

action_plan.reason: Capture current measure state before any edit
Wait for Monaco editor to initialize

action_plan.value:
Current Year Sales =
CALCULATE(
    [Total Sales],
    'Date'[Year] = YEAR(TODAY())
)

positive_cases.name: FILTER(ALL(Date)) with YEAR(TODAY()) equality
positive_cases.expected_issue: adv-perf-001: FILTER(ALL(dim)) for single equality — use direct column filter

edge_cases.name: FILTER(ALL(Date)) with YEAR(TODAY()) but fiscal year model
edge_cases.expected_issue: Rule fires but fix must use DATESYTD with fiscal year-end argument, not direct Year filter

fallback_rules: Do not invent Power BI model state — only use what is visible in the screenshot or page context
Use screenshot and DOM context when available before reasoning from general knowledge
Ask for approval before any action that saves, publishes, deletes, overwrites, or exports
Prefer proposing a deterministic rule if the issue can be expressed as a programmatic pattern
If uncertain about intent or side effects, set requires_user_approval true and risk_level high
Never set fix_type to safe if the fix changes business logic, measure scope, or security filters
All action_plan steps that modify the model must have requires_approval true
Screenshot steps before and after any model change are mandatory in the action_plan
If diagnosis involves RLS or security, always set risk_level to high
Do not suggest XMLA or REST API operations without confirming the user has the required permissions
